name: Kikyou
description:
Kikyou is a Kuja warrior from Amazon Lily. She seems to be one of the toughest and most serious of the Kuja and greatly discourages Luffy's presence on the island, especially when seeing the return of Boa Hancock. Although she is harsh, she does have compassion for her fellow Kuja members, as seen when Boa Marigold attempted to smash the petrified Marguerite. Kikyou was also strong enough to withstand Luffy's Haoushoku-level Haki without fainting. Of the Kuja at the party after the arena fight, she the only one not amused at Luffy's antics. She also shouts at the Kujas who put sticks in their mouths and noses during Luffy's departure from the island with Hancock.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
